PRICE DISCREPANCY (still open): the approved JW Marriott corridor PH copy in ALL_POST_COPY_V3.json contains stale villa prices (Villa D PHP 28,000,000 / Villa C PHP 30,000,000) that conflict with authoritative pricing in CLAUDE.md and campaign_state.json (Villa C PHP 35,000,000, Villa D PHP 32,500,000). Removed that single price line rather than publish incorrect prices, consistent with the 2026-06-03 and 2026-06-04 runs. All other approved claims kept verbatim. Claude Code should update ALL_POST_COPY_V3.json to current prices before a price-bearing PH post is published.

Browser: autonomous scheduled run, no user present. After publishing, FB showed an 'Add WhatsApp button' upsell; dismissed with 'Not now' to avoid a standing config change.
